# Layer 0 Configuration
# Generated by e003_tcam_config_generator.py
# Neurons: 10
# Sparsity: 90.00%
# Rules: 10
# Multicast groups: 10

set vlans VLAN_0 vlan-id 0
set vlans VLAN_1 vlan-id 1
set vlans VLAN_0 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N0_MCAST interface xe-0/0/0
set vlans VLAN_0 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N1_MCAST interface xe-0/0/1
set vlans VLAN_0 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N2_MCAST interface xe-0/0/2
set vlans VLAN_0 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N3_MCAST interface xe-0/0/3
set vlans VLAN_0 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N4_MCAST interface xe-0/0/4
set vlans VLAN_1 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N5_MCAST interface xe-0/0/5
set vlans VLAN_1 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N6_MCAST interface xe-0/0/6
set vlans VLAN_1 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N7_MCAST interface xe-0/0/7
set vlans VLAN_1 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N8_MCAST interface xe-0/0/8
set vlans VLAN_1 forwarding-options multicast group L0_N9_MCAST interface xe-0/0/9
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N0 from vlan-id 0
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N0 from source-port xe-0/0/0
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N0 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N0 then forwarding-class L0_N0_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N0 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N1 from vlan-id 0
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N1 from source-port xe-0/0/1
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N1 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N1 then forwarding-class L0_N1_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N1 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N2 from vlan-id 0
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N2 from source-port xe-0/0/2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N2 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N2 then forwarding-class L0_N2_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N2 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N3 from vlan-id 0
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N3 from source-port xe-0/0/3
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N3 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N3 then forwarding-class L0_N3_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N3 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N4 from vlan-id 0
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N4 from source-port xe-0/0/4
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N4 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N4 then forwarding-class L0_N4_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N4 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N5 from vlan-id 1
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N5 from source-port xe-0/0/5
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N5 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N5 then forwarding-class L0_N5_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N5 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N6 from vlan-id 1
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N6 from source-port xe-0/0/6
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N6 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N6 then forwarding-class L0_N6_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N6 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N7 from vlan-id 1
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N7 from source-port xe-0/0/7
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N7 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N7 then forwarding-class L0_N7_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N7 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N8 from vlan-id 1
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N8 from source-port xe-0/0/8
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N8 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N8 then forwarding-class L0_N8_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N8 then accept
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N9 from vlan-id 1
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N9 from source-port xe-0/0/9
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N9 then vlan 2
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N9 then forwarding-class L0_N9_MCAST
set firewall family ethernet-switching filter LAYER_0_FILTER term N9 then accept
